pages.raw_text:
The convention of county superin-
tendents of schools from all the coun-
ties in the state will meet tomorrow,
probably at the Hotel Spokane. II
is thought that practically all of the
superintendents in the state will at
tend the convention.


Matters of general importance will
be considered by the convention. One
of the most important questions Is
the one in reference to uniform text
books throughout the state. There is
a set of books which has been adopted
by the state but the schools are allow
ed at present to supplement these
with books Of their own choice. The
result is that there is not the uniform
it, which is desired. 1t is also hoped
to modify the list of text books at
present used and to make some sub
stitutions.


The convention win also consider the
question as to the disposition of school
lands. There is a divided opinion Ms
to whether the school lands now held
should be sold.


The session will last three days.
Much of interest, both to the superin.
tendents and school directors. will
come before the convention. The aim
of the county superintendents is to
have uniformity throughout the var
ious counties Of the state.
